chatWithMessages.assistantMessage:
Mimi ni Kai — msaidizi wa kibinafsi anayekaa na kukujua kweli kweli.

```kai-ui
{"type": "column", "children": [{"type": "card", "children": [{"type": "text", "value": "Ninakumbuka", "style": "title", "bold": true}, {"type": "text", "value": "Mapendeleo yako, miradi, jinsi unavyopenda mambo yafanywe. Mwezi ujao, bado ninajua.", "style": "body"}]}, {"type": "card", "children": [{"type": "text", "value": "Ninakamilisha kazi", "style": "title", "bold": true}, {"type": "text", "value": "Vikumbusho, barua pepe, kalenda, amri za shell — nimeunganishwa na kifaa chako na maisha yako.", "style": "body"}]}, {"type": "card", "children": [{"type": "text", "value": "Ninajifunza", "style": "title", "bold": true}, {"type": "text", "value": "Si ukweli tu, bali mifumo. Kinachokufaa, kisichokufaa. Ninaboresheka kadri muda unavyopita.", "style": "body"}]}, {"type": "button", "label": "Tuanze", "action": {"type": "callback", "event": "start"}}, {"type": "button", "label": "Niweke tayari", "action": {"type": "callback", "event": "setup"}}]}
```
